name: Aramark
business: Aramark is a leading global provider of food and facilities services to education, healthcare, business & industry, and sports, leisure & corrections clients. Its largest market is the United States, with operations in 15 other countries. The company operates in two reportable segments: FSS United States and FSS International.
sellsTo: Sports, Leisure & Corrections (stadiums, arenas, parks, correctional institutions)
